allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Stars: {d[""stargazers_count""]}''''\); print\(f''''Forks: {d[""forks_count""]}''''\); print\(f''''Open Issues: {d[""open_issues_count""]}''''\); print\(f''''Watchers: {d[""subscribers_count""]}''''\); print\(f''''Description: {d[""description""]}''''\)")
